attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.PRICE_METHOD_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.METHOD_NAME, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.SOURCE_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.TRANSACTION_TABLE, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.RATE_SET_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.ACTIVITY_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.DATA_SOURCE, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.SQL_BUILD_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.ATTRIBUTE_SET_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.BASE_VAL_ATTRIBUTE_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.BASE_CURR_ATTRIBUTE_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.ARQC1_ATTRIBUTE_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.ARQC2_ATTRIBUTE_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.OWNER_ATTRIBUTE_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.PARTNER_ATTRIBUTE_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.EXCHANGE_RATE_TYPE, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.EXCHANGE_DATE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.TO_CURR_INDICATOR, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.TO_CURR_ATTRIBUTE_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.GIVEN_ADJUSTMENT_RATE_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.EXTENDED_VALUES, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.WHEN_NO_ADJUSTMENT_RATE, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.WHEN_BASE_VAL_ZERO, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.WHEN_IC_PRICE_ZERO, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.WHEN_DI_NOT_FOUND, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.WHEN_DI_TOO_MANY_FOUND, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.DFT_BASE_VAL_ATTRIBUTE_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.DFT_BASE_CURR_ATTRIBUTE_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.DFT_BASE_VAL_NOT_ZERO, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.DFT_BASE_VAL_EXTENDED, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.DIAGNOSTICS_CODE, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.DFT_DIAGNOSTICS_CODE, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.CREATED_BY, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.CREATION_DATE, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.MD_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.ADJ_DATE_ATTRIBUTE_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.PRICING_CALCULATION, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.PRICING_PRECISION_TYPE, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.PRICING_EXTENDED, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.FORMULA_SET_ID, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.WHEN_FORMULA_SET_FAILS, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.SS_CODE, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.REFRESH_DATETIME, 1 AS BATCH_ID,
'I' AS ACTION_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS CREATE_DATETIME 
FROM
 $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD
WHERE   SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND   SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY CG1_XXCP_PRICING_METHOD.PRICE_METHOD_ID ORDER BY   REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
